scripts.test: node pi-install-security.ts verify && npm run typecheck && node --test workspace-guard.test.ts oauth-cli.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --allowImportingTsExtensions --skipLibCheck oauth-cli.ts oauth-cli.test.ts pi-install-security.ts rpc-test-process.ts workspace-guard.ts workspace-guard.test.ts
